e-waste.name: Ecoli Waste Management
e-waste.address: Trade Square, Dharm Nagar II, Sabarmati, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380005
e-waste.notes: GPCB and AMC authorized e-waste recycler with free pickup.
e-waste.offerType: Pays ₹250 – ₹1,200 per device / ₹55 per kg for circuit scrap

e-waste.name: ECS Environment Pvt Ltd

e-waste.quantityAdvice: For 1-2 devices, you can usually get a quick payout; for more than 5 devices, ask for a business pickup.
e-waste.bulkGuide: Schools, startups, and call centers can arrange regular collection for small electronics.

e-waste.name: Atul Electronics Recycling
e-waste.notes: Accepts laptops, phones, and circuit boards with proper data destruction.

e-waste.quantityAdvice: 1-2 units are simple; bulk lots can be collected as a corporate pickup.

e-waste.quantityAdvice: Perfect for fast cash on 1-2 old appliances or adapters.

organic-food.name: Ahimsan Biogas Plant

agricultural.name: Agro-Paper Pulp Industries
